name: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc.
description: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. is a non-diversified, closed-end investment company that seeks to provide a high after-tax total return with an emphasis on making cash distributions to stockholders. The fund primarily invests at least 80% of its total assets in securities of North American energy infrastructure companies, including traditional midstream, natural gas, LNG, and power infrastructure. Managed by KA Fund Advisors, LLC, the fund aims to capitalize on long-term structural demand trends in the energy sector while offering investors a simplified tax reporting structure through a single Form 1099.
